SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class GenericConnectorFieldMapping

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafioschtrader.entities.GenericConnectorFieldMapping
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class GenericConnectorFieldMapping extends BaseID<Integer> implements Serializable
Maps a single field from a data provider's response to a target entity field. For FS_HISTORY endpoints, target fields are: date, open, high, low, close, volume. For FS_INTRA endpoints: last, open, high, low, volume, prevClose, changePercentage, timestamp.
See Also:
